actions.description:
### If this applies to you

Speak to your healthcare professional if you think you should be offered this vaccine.

For anything else, visit our [help and support page](https://www.nhs.uk/nhs-app/nhs-app-help-and-support/).

eligibilityCohorts.cohortText: are not aged 75 or over by 31 January 2026
are not aged 16 or over and immunosuppressed

processedSuggestions.statusText: We do not believe you can have it
